abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Behemoth
abilities.text: This model cannot be placed by other models. When it would be moved by another model, halve the distance it moves.

abilities.name: Demise (Reform From Ice)
abilities.text: Once per turn. When this model is killed, it may place into base contact with a friendly Ice Pillar or Scheme marker within 6". If it does so, it may remove that marker to heal 5.

actions.name: Frozen Smash
actions.effects: This model may remove a friendly token from the target to increase this action's Dmg by 1.

triggers.name: Heave
triggers.text: Place the target anywhere within 3" of this model.

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

triggers.name: Mutilate
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a Slow token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise, it gains a Slow token.

actions.name: Frozen Creation
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. This model deals 3 irreducible damage to itself.
actions.effects: Summon an Ice Gamin in base contact with this model.

actions.name: Stinging Cold
actions.effects: Enemy models within (t)3" of the target must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or gain a Slow token.
